name: Nikto
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Web server scanner that tests for dangerous files, outdated software, and other issues. Runs real scans built from reusable, data-driven Scan Profiles (see profiles/) -- Nikto's XML report is parsed and normalized into observations/evidence, never a fabricated finding.

install_instructions.linux: `sudo apt install nikto` (Debian/Ubuntu/Kali) or `sudo dnf install nikto` (Fedora/RHEL); on Arch, install from the AUR (`yay -S nikto`) or clone https://github.com/sullo/nikto directly. See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
